title: ZREM
description: Removes one or more members from a sorted set. Deletes the sorted set if all members were removed.
complexity: O(M*log(N)) with N being the number of elements in the sorted set and M the number of elements to be removed.

sections.title: Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility

content:
Removes the specified members from the sorted set stored at `key`. Non existing members are ignored. An error is returned when `key` exists and does not hold a sorted set. ## Examples ZADD myzset 1 "one" ZADD myzset 2 "two" ZADD myzset 3 "three" ZREM myzset "two" ZRANGE myzset 0 -1 WITHSCORES ## Redis Software and Redis Cloud compatibility | Redis
Software | Redis
Cloud | Notes | |:----------------------|:-----------------|:------| | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | ✅ Standard
✅ Active-Active | | ## Return information **RESP2:** [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the number of members removed from the sorted set, not including non-existing members. **RESP3:** [Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the number of members removed from the sorted set, not including non-existing members.
intro:
Removes the specified members from the sorted set stored at `key`.
Non existing members are ignored.

An error is returned when `key` exists and does not hold a sorted set.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content:
Removes the specified members from the sorted set stored at `key`.
Non existing members are ignored.

An error is returned when `key` exists and does not hold a sorted set.

sections.title: Examples
sections.content:
ZADD myzset 1 "one"
ZADD myzset 2 "two"
ZADD myzset 3 "three"
ZREM myzset "two"
ZRANGE myzset 0 -1 WITHSCORES

sections.title: Return information
sections.content:
**RESP2:**

[Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the number of members removed from the sorted set, not including non-existing members.

**RESP3:**

[Integer reply](../../develop/reference/protocol-spec#integers): the number of members removed from the sorted set, not including non-existing members.
